hooks.command: python -c 'import pathlib,runpy; p=pathlib.Path.cwd(); r=next((q for q in [p,*p.parents] if (q/".claude/hooks/block-prod.py").is_file()), None); r and runpy.run_path(str(r/".claude/hooks/block-prod.py"), run_name="__main__")'
